channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Knicks' Karl-Anthony Towns gets praise from his NBA inspiration after win
item.description: Karl-Anthony Towns will "be beloved forever," Magic Johnson said in a surprise congratulatory message on "CBS Mornings" after the New York Knicks won ...

item.title: WATCH: ABC News interviews Barack and Michelle Obama: Exclusive
item.description: Here is a first look at Robin Roberts' conversation with former President Barack Obama and former first lady Michelle Obama ahead of this week's openi...

item.title: Trump admin pushes back on court order to restore historical sites
item.description: The National Park Service filed an appeal to dismiss a judge's ruling that the federal government must restore historical sites and materials at natio...

item.title: WATCH: Cast of 'Moana' ready to set sail
item.description: Dwayne Johnson and Catherine Laga'aia launched the live-action "Moana" press tour as new song "Along The Way," written by Lin-Manuel Miranda, debuts a...
